doc_title_en: Update on Measures to Realize Management Focused on Capital Cost and Share Price
doc_title_jp: 資本コストや株価を意識した経営の実現に向けた対応のアップデートについて

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本効率改善と市場評価向上。PBR0.62倍、ROE6.7%と目標未達。内部留保不足、株主還元期待への未対応が低評価要因。

summary_en: FY3/26 results: ROE 6.7%, PBR 0.62x. Company attributes low valuation to weak domestic demand in core divisions (drawn copper, precision parts, piping/plating), insufficient retained earnings, and unmet shareholder return expectations. Medium-term target: PBR ≥1.0x via (1) revenue growth from Mitani Shinten integration, high-value product expansion, group procurement cost reduction; (2) M&A-led growth investment, progressive dividend policy, capital-efficiency focus; (3) enhanced IR (English disclosure, investor dialogue).
summary_jp: FY3/26決算：ROE 6.7%、PBR 0.62倍。低評価理由は国内需要低迷、内部留保不足、株主還元期待への未対応。中期目標：PBR1倍以上。施策は(1)三谷伸銅統合効果、高付加価値製品拡充、グループ共同購買コスト削減、(2)M&A、累進配当、資本効率重視、(3)英文開示・機関投資家対話強化。
tag_en: COC Update - ROE 6.7% (FY3/26) / PBR 0.62x - Target PBR ≥1.0x via revenue growth, cost reduction, progressive dividends
tag_jp: COC更新 - ROE 6.7%（FY3/26）/ PBR 0.62倍 - PBR1倍以上を目指す（収益力強化、配当施策等）
